content_body:
Blue Ridge Paintball Park is 10+ acres of diverse play fields designed for both the pro player as well as the newbie adrenaline seekers.  Get out in nature and play recreational woodsball in the North Georgia forests, or hone your strategy on a traditional speedball course.  For the young ones, BRP offers both gellyball and Nerf play. Park owners Rob (aka. Grim) Gale and Laura Gale bring over 30+ years experience in the sport.

Looking for something out of the ordinary for your next corporate event? Need a memorable experience for your bachelor or bachelorette party? Let us help you build your custom adventure at Blue Ridge Paintball.
title: Blue Ridge Paintball
